SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.equipment.watertreatment

Class OilInWaterAnalyzerDriftModel

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.watertreatment.OilInWaterAnalyzerDriftModel
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class OilInWaterAnalyzerDriftModel extends Object implements Serializable
Deterministic oil-in-water analyzer drift and bias model.

The model represents zero offset, span bias, drift rates, and a conservative uncertainty margin. It is intended for data-quality screening, corrected OIW estimates, and warning calculations for offshore produced-water analyzers.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • OilInWaterAnalyzerDriftModel

      public OilInWaterAnalyzerDriftModel()
      Creates an analyzer drift model with no bias or drift.

  • Method Details

    • measure

      public double measure(double trueOilInWaterMgL, double daysSinceCalibration)
      Calculates the expected analyzer reading for a true OIW concentration.
      Parameters:
      trueOilInWaterMgL - true OIW concentration in mg/L
      daysSinceCalibration - days since analyzer calibration
      Returns:
      expected analyzer reading in mg/L

    • measureConservative

      public double measureConservative(double trueOilInWaterMgL, double daysSinceCalibration, double confidenceMultiplier)
      Calculates a conservative analyzer reading including a deterministic uncertainty margin.
      Parameters:
      trueOilInWaterMgL - true OIW concentration in mg/L
      daysSinceCalibration - days since analyzer calibration
      confidenceMultiplier - multiplier on noise standard deviation
      Returns:
      conservative analyzer reading in mg/L

    • correctMeasuredValue

      public double correctMeasuredValue(double measuredOilInWaterMgL, double daysSinceCalibration)
      Corrects a measured OIW value back to estimated true OIW.
      Parameters:
      measuredOilInWaterMgL - measured OIW concentration in mg/L
      daysSinceCalibration - days since analyzer calibration
      Returns:
      corrected OIW concentration in mg/L

    • calibrate

      public void calibrate(double measuredZeroMgL, double measuredSpanMgL, double referenceSpanMgL)
      Updates zero and span factors from a two-point field calibration.
      Parameters:
      measuredZeroMgL - analyzer reading for a zero reference in mg/L
      measuredSpanMgL - analyzer reading for a span reference in mg/L
      referenceSpanMgL - true span reference concentration in mg/L
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if referenceSpanMgL is not positive

    • isCalibrationDue

      public boolean isCalibrationDue(double daysSinceCalibration)
      Checks if the analyzer is beyond the recommended calibration interval.
      Parameters:
      daysSinceCalibration - days since analyzer calibration
      Returns:
      true if calibration is due

    • toJson

      public String toJson()
      Serializes the analyzer model state to JSON.
      Returns:
      JSON representation
